header.title: who's
header.subtitle: GMV + consistency became a single score. Let's climb.

empty.title: ranking still empty.
empty.description: When other students opt in, they'll appear here. You can activate yours on the account page.

modal.title: The ranking score
modal.consistencyDescription: How much you hit your daily routine during the ranking period. Every day you open the routine and click "Complete day" counts as 1 point in your consistency.
modal.consistencyExample1: 30 days with routine done in the month = 100% consistency = 60 points
modal.gmvDescription: GMV is how much you sold on TikTok Shop in the period — the gross value, before fees and commissions (not net profit). It's relative to the group — if the top creator sold $10k and you sold $5k, you get 50% of 40 points. Set yours on Account → GMV, update during the month.
modal.gmvTip: 💡 Because GMV is relative, someone who sold less can rank well if they keep consistency high. Conversely: selling a lot isn't enough if you don't hit the routine.
modal.tipsDescription: Hit the routine every day. Even days you did the minimum, mark and complete. Daily consistency weighs most — in 2 weeks hitting daily you already pass those who only sold 💕
